replies.msg:
https://www.etiasvisa.com/etias-requirements/hongkongers

At the moment citizens of Hong Kong can travel to the Schengen Zone without a visa.
As off 2021, Hong Kongese traveling to EU Schengen member countries will be obliged to apply online to obtain their Etias visa.

This will be a mandatory requirement for citizens of third member countries that currently can travel to Europe without a visa.

似係全世界依家免簽嘅國家都要申請喎
